skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: The acceleration of a particle is 5.6 meters per second squared. What is this rate, in miles per minute squared, rounded to the nearest tenth? (Use 1 mile = 1,609 meters.)
rationale: Convert: 5.6 m/s² × (1 mile/1,609 m) × (60 s/min)² = 5.6 × 3,600 / 1,609 = 20,160 / 1,609 ≈ 12.53 miles per minute squared. Rounded to the nearest tenth, this is 12.5. Choice (b) is correct.
